# Carmen Inventory — Dashboard Specification

![Main Dashboard](data:image/png;base64,)

**Route:** `/dashboard/main`
**Module:** Dashboard
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-21
**Source:** Screenshot analysis — ZB01 ZEBRA (AVG), logged in as Purchase role

---

## 1. Scope & Filters

All widgets on this dashboard are scoped by:

| Filter | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Tenant / Property | Current session tenant (e.g. ZB01) | JWT / session context |
| Date range | Current calendar month (MTD) | Server date, reset on 1st of month |
| Currency | Tenant base currency (e.g. THB) | Tenant config |

> No user-level filtering is applied — the dashboard shows organisation-wide figures for the current property, regardless of the logged-in user's department.

---

## 2. KPI Cards (Top Row)

### 2.1 Total Spend This Month

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Label | Total Spend This Month |
| Display | Currency value (฿X,XXX,XXX) + trend badge vs last month |
| Source entity | Purchase Order (PO) line items |
| Calculation | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` WHERE `po.status IN ('APPROVED', 'COMPLETED', 'RECEIVED')` AND `po.approved_date` within current month AND `po.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Trend badge | `((this_month - last_month) / last_month) * 100` — shown as "+X% vs Last Month" in green (positive) or red (negative) |
| Notes | Spend is committed at PO approval, not PR creation. Only POs that have reached an approved/fulfilled state are counted. |

### 2.2 Pending PRs Count

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Label | Pending PRs Count |
| Subtitle | "HOD Approved, Awaiting Purchase" |
| Display | Integer count |
| Source entity | Purchase Request (PR) |
| Calculation | `COUNT(pr.id)` WHERE `pr.status = 'INPROGRESS'` AND current workflow stage = Purchase (i.e. routed to Purchasing Staff, not yet approved at purchase level) AND `pr.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Stage filter | PRs that have passed HOD approval but not yet been actioned by Purchasing Staff — maps to the "Awaiting Purchase" stage in the PR workflow |
| Notes | This is a real-time count (not MTD). Reflects current backlog, not historical. |

### 2.3 Open POs Count

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Label | Open POs Count |
| Subtitle | "Waiting for Delivery" |
| Display | Integer count |
| Source entity | Purchase Order (PO) |
| Calculation | `COUNT(po.id)` WHERE `po.status = 'OPEN'` OR `po.status = 'PARTIALLY_RECEIVED'` AND `po.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Notes | Real-time count. A PO remains "open" until all line items are fully received via Goods Receive Note (GRN). Partially received POs are included. |

### 2.4 Actual Spend vs Budget (% ทั้งองค์กร)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Label | Actual Spend vs Budget (% ทั้งองค์กร / Organisation-wide) |
| Display | Percentage + horizontal progress bar |
| Source entities | Budget (annual/monthly allocation) + PO spend |
| Calculation | `(SUM of approved PO spend this month) / (total approved budget for this month) * 100` |
| Budget source | Budget table scoped to current month and tenant — sum of all department budget allocations |
| Spend source | Same as §2.1 (approved/completed PO total_amount, current month) |
| Notes | Shows organisation-wide budget utilisation. Individual department breakdown is in §4 (Spend by Department). Bar turns red if value exceeds 80% (threshold TBC). |

---

## 3. Spend by Material Group (Donut Chart)

**Thai label:** ยอดซื้อแยกตามหมวดหมู่
**Chart type:** Donut / Pie

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Source entities | PO line items (`po_detail`) joined to `item` → `material_group` |
| Calculation | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` GROUP BY `material_group.name` WHERE same PO scope as §2.1 (approved/completed, current month, current tenant) |
| Segments | One segment per material group. Groups shown: อาหาร (Food), เครื่องดื่ม (Beverage), ของใช้ (Supplies), เคมีภัณฑ์ (Chemicals), อื่นๆ (Others) |
| "Others" bucket | Any material group not in the top 4 by spend value is collapsed into อื่นๆ |
| Labels | Percentage of total spend per segment |
| Legend | Material group name (Thai) + colour swatch |
| Sort | Descending by spend value |

---

## 4. Spend by Business Unit / Department (Horizontal Bar Chart)

**Thai label:** ยอดซื้อแยกตามแผนก
**Chart type:** Horizontal bar

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Source entities | PO line items → PR → `department` (creator's department at PR creation time) |
| Calculation | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` GROUP BY `department.name` WHERE same PO scope as §2.1 |
| Bars | One bar per department. Sorted descending by spend value. |
| Value label | Currency value shown at end of each bar (e.g. ฿1,250,000) |
| X-axis | Linear scale from 0 to highest department spend |
| Max bars shown | Top N departments (appears to be ~5–6); remaining collapsed or hidden |
| Notes | Department is derived from the PR creator's department, not from the PO vendor or delivery point. |

---

## 5. PR Pipeline: Bottleneck Analysis

**Chart type:** Horizontal pipeline / funnel bar chart
**Subtitle:** PR/PO Status Pipeline

Each row represents a workflow stage. Shows count of PRs/POs currently at that stage and their total value.

| Stage | Status Filter | Bottleneck Flag |
|-------|--------------|-----------------|
| Saved | `pr.status = 'DRAFT'` | No |
| Committed | `pr.status = 'INPROGRESS'` AND stage = initial submission (pre-HOD) | No |
| Awaiting HOD | `pr.status = 'INPROGRESS'` AND current workflow stage = HOD | Yes — if count exceeds threshold |
| Awaiting Purchase | `pr.status = 'INPROGRESS'` AND current workflow stage = Purchase | Yes — if count exceeds threshold |
| Approved | `pr.status = 'APPROVED'` (within current month) | No |
| Rejected | `pr.status = 'REJECTED'` (within current month) | No |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Count | `COUNT(pr.id)` per stage bucket |
| Value | `SUM(pr_detail.total_amount)` for all items on PRs in that stage |
| Bar width | Proportional to count (not value) |
| Bottleneck flag | ⚠️ Bottleneck shown when count ≥ a configurable threshold (observed threshold: appears to flag stages with highest counts relative to pipeline) |
| Scope | Real-time (not MTD) — reflects current state of all PRs in the tenant |

---

## 6. Top 5 Vendors by Spend

**Thai label:** ผู้จำหน่าย 5 อันดับแรกที่มีมูลค่าการซื้อสูงสุด
**Chart type:** Table

| Column | Source | Calculation |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| ชื่อผู้จำหน่าย (Vendor Name) | `vendor.name` | — |
| ยอดซื้อ (Spend) | PO line items | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` WHERE `po_detail.vendor_id = vendor.id` AND same PO scope as §2.1 |
| จำนวน PO (PO Count) | Purchase Order | `COUNT(DISTINCT po.id)` WHERE `po` has at least one line from this vendor, current month, current tenant |
| Avg Delivery Time (Days) | Goods Receive Note (GRN) | `AVG(grn.received_date - po.issued_date)` in days, for POs linked to this vendor where GRN exists in the current month |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Ranking | Vendors ranked by `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` descending |
| Rows shown | Top 5 only |
| Scope | Current month, current tenant — same as §2.1 |
| Status column | Appears for vendors with a special status badge (e.g. preferred vendor flag) — source: `vendor.status` or `vendor.tier` field |

---

## 7. Data Refresh

| Widget | Refresh strategy |
|--------|-----------------|
| KPI cards | Real-time or near-real-time (polling or server push) |
| Pipeline count (§5) | Real-time — reflects live PR status |
| Charts (§3, §4, §6) | Cached / periodic refresh (likely every 5–15 min) — MTD aggregates are expensive to recompute on every request |
| Budget % (§2.4) | Matches chart refresh cadence |

---

## 8. Access & Role Visibility

| Role | Dashboard Access | Notes |
|------|-----------------|-------|
| Creator (Requestor) | Likely limited view — own PRs only | TBC |
| Purchaser | Full org-wide dashboard | Confirmed (screenshot) |
| Approver (HOD/FC/GM/Owner) | Full org-wide dashboard | Assumed |
| Admin | Full | Assumed |

> Figures shown are organisation-wide regardless of the logged-in user's department scope for the Purchaser and Approver roles.

---

## 9. Open Questions

| # | Question | Impact |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | Does "Spend" use PO approval date or GRN received date as the MTD anchor? | Affects §2.1, §3, §4, §6 totals |
| 2 | What is the bottleneck threshold for the pipeline (§5)? Fixed count or relative? | Affects bottleneck flag logic |
| 3 | Are cancelled/voided POs excluded from spend totals? | Affects all spend widgets |
| 4 | Does the department in §4 come from the PR creator or the PO delivery point? | Affects chart grouping |
| 5 | Is Avg Delivery Time (§6) based on all-time vendor history or current month only? | Affects vendor table accuracy |
| 6 | What triggers the "Status" badge in the Top Vendors table? | Affects §6 display logic |

---

# Dashboard 2 — My PR: Personal Requisitions Dashboard

![My PR Personal Dashboard](data:image/png;base64,)

**Route:** `/dashboard/pr`
**Title:** MY PR – PERSONAL REQUISITIONS DASHBOARD
**Subtitle:** "Welcome back! Here's your PR update for [date]"
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-21
**Source:** Screenshot — ZB01 ZEBRA, logged in as Purchase role (ศิริวรรณ), Mar 12 2026 10:30 AM

---

## D2.1 Scope & Filters

All widgets on this dashboard are scoped to the **currently logged-in user's own PRs only** — not organisation-wide.

| Filter | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Tenant / Property | Current session tenant | JWT / session context |
| User scope | `pr.created_by = current_user.id` | Session user ID |
| Date range | All-time (pipeline) or current month (spend charts) | Widget-specific — see below |

> This is a personal dashboard. The pipeline counts and task queue reflect only PRs created by the logged-in user. Spend charts have a dual view: personal spend + department spend.

---

## D2.2 PR Summary (Status Pipeline)

Five stage cards shown left-to-right with arrow connectors, representing the PR lifecycle.

| Stage | Label | Status / Condition | Count Basis |
|-------|-------|--------------------|-------------|
| 1 | REQUESTS | `pr.status = 'DRAFT'` | PRs saved but not yet submitted |
| 2 | IN PROCESS | `pr.status = 'INPROGRESS'` | PRs submitted and moving through approval stages |
| 3 | APPROVED | `pr.status = 'APPROVED'` | PRs fully approved at all levels |
| 4 | PO GENERATED | PO created and linked to PR (`po.pr_id = pr.id`) AND `po.status != 'CANCELLED'` | PRs where at least one PO has been generated |
| 5 | RECEIVED | GRN exists and fully received — `grn.status = 'COMPLETED'` for all PO lines | PRs where all items have been goods-received |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Calculation | `COUNT(pr.id)` per stage WHERE `pr.created_by = current_user.id` AND `pr.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Scope | All-time (not MTD) — reflects full history for this user |
| Progress bar | Colour-coded by stage health (blue = normal, orange = delayed, green = complete) — threshold TBC |
| Flow direction | Left → right represents forward workflow progress; numbers accumulate as PRs move forward |

---

## D2.3 Sent Back PRs

**Label:** SENT BACK PRS
**Note:** "Connects back to previous responses"

PRs that were returned to this user for revision by an approver or purchaser.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| PR Number | `pr.pr_number` | Clickable — links to PR detail |
| Item Name | `pr_detail.item_name` | First or all items on the returned PR (one row per item or per PR — TBC) |
| Date Sent | `pr_workflow_history.action_date` WHERE `action = 'RETURN'` | Date the return action was taken |
| Sender | `user.name` of the user who performed the return | Approver or Purchaser who returned it |
| Reason | `pr_workflow_history.comment` | Return reason text — truncated in list, full on click |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Filter | `pr.status = 'RETURNED'` AND `pr.created_by = current_user.id` |
| Sort | Date Sent descending (most recent first) |
| Scope | Real-time — all currently returned PRs for this user |
| Action | "Connects back to previous responses" suggests clicking a row navigates to the PR detail with the return reason highlighted |

---

## D2.4 PRs Rejected & Item Rejects

**Label:** PRS REJECTED & ITEM REJECTS
**Note:** "Connects back to previous responses"

PRs or individual line items that were rejected (terminal state — creator cannot resubmit).

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| PR Number / Item ID | `pr.pr_number` + `pr_detail.id` | Combined — row per rejected item |
| Material Name | `pr_detail.item_name` or `item.name` | The rejected item |
| Requester | `user.name` of PR creator | Should always be the current user in this personal view |
| Rejected By | `user.name` of the user who rejected | Approver who issued the rejection |
| Reason | `pr_workflow_history.comment` WHERE `action = 'REJECT'` | Rejection reason — truncated |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Filter | `pr.status = 'REJECTED'` OR `pr_detail.status = 'REJECTED'` AND `pr.created_by = current_user.id` |
| Sort | Most recent rejection date descending |
| Scope | TBC — may be limited to current month or last N days to avoid unbounded list |

---

## D2.5 Spending by Category

Split into two side-by-side sub-widgets.

### D2.5.1 My Spending (Personal) — Donut Chart

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Source | PO line items WHERE the originating PR was created by current user |
| Calculation | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` GROUP BY `material_group.name` WHERE `pr.created_by = current_user.id` AND current month AND PO in approved/completed state |
| Segments | One per material group — observed: Food 45%, Beverage 30%, Guest Supply 25%, 1% other |
| Labels | Percentage of personal total spend per category |

### D2.5.2 Department Spending (F&B Dept) — Horizontal Bar Chart

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Source | PO line items for all PRs in the current user's department |
| Calculation | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` GROUP BY `material_group.name` WHERE `pr.department_id = current_user.department_id` AND current month AND PO in approved/completed state |
| Bars | One bar per material group — observed: Food ฿54,000, Beverage ฿24,000, Guest Supply ฿15,500 |
| Department label | Shows current user's department name as subtitle (e.g. "F&B Dept") |
| Notes | Department scope uses the PR creator's department at creation time |

---

## D2.6 PRs Awaiting Approval (Task Queue)

**Label:** PRS AWAITING APPROVAL (TASK QUEUE)

PRs created by the current user that are in-flight and waiting for action from someone else.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| PR Number | `pr.pr_number` | Clickable — links to PR detail |
| Item Name | `pr_detail.item_name` | First item or representative item on the PR |
| Requester | `user.name` of PR creator | Always current user in this personal view |
| Dept | `department.name` of the PR creator | Creator's department |
| Date Requested ↓ | `pr.submitted_date` | Date the PR was submitted; sorted descending by default |
| Status | Current workflow stage label | e.g. "Awaiting HOD Approve", "Awaiting PO" — colour-coded badge |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Filter | `pr.status = 'INPROGRESS'` AND `pr.created_by = current_user.id` |
| Sort | Date Requested descending (default — indicated by ↓ arrow on column header) |
| Scope | Real-time — all currently in-flight PRs for this user |
| Action | "Direct details ›" link on each row — navigates to PR detail |
| Icons | Bell (🔔) and clock (⏰) icons top-right — likely notification/reminder triggers (TBC) |

### Status Badge Mapping

| Badge Label | Meaning | PR Workflow Stage |
|-------------|---------|-------------------|
| Awaiting HOD Approve | Submitted, pending HOD review | HOD stage |
| Awaiting PO | HOD approved, pending Purchase Officer action | Purchase stage |
| Awaiting FC | Passed Purchase, pending FC approval | FC stage |
| Awaiting GM | Passed FC, pending GM approval | GM stage (TBC) |

---

## D2.7 Key Differences vs Main Dashboard (§1–9)

| Aspect | Main Dashboard (`/dashboard/main`) | Personal PR Dashboard (`/dashboard/pr`) |
|--------|-----------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| Scope | Organisation-wide (all users, all departments) | Current user's PRs only |
| Pipeline | PR/PO bottleneck by stage (count + value) | User's personal PR lifecycle stages |
| Spend charts | By material group (org) + by department (org) | Personal spend + own department spend |
| Action tables | None | Sent Back PRs, Rejected PRs, Task Queue |
| Refresh | Cached MTD aggregates + real-time pipeline | Real-time pipeline + MTD spend |
| Primary audience | Purchaser / Approver / Manager | Creator (Requestor) |

---

# Dashboard 3 — Purchase Order Dashboard

![Purchase Order Dashboard](data:image/png;base64,)

**Route:** `/dashboard/po`
**Title:** Purchase Order Dashboard
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-21
**Source:** Screenshot — ZB01 ZEBRA, logged in as Purchase role, Mar 12 2026

---

## D3.1 Scope & Filters

| Filter | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Tenant / Property | Current session tenant | JWT / session context |
| User scope | Organisation-wide (all departments) | Not personal — shows all POs in tenant |
| Date range | Widget-specific — see each section | Mix of real-time and MTD |

---

## D3.2 PO Status Pipeline (Top Row)

Six stage cards representing the full PO lifecycle. Counts are real-time.

| Card | Status Name | Meaning | System Status |
|------|-------------|---------|---------------|
| 1 | NOT SENT | PO created but not yet sent to vendor | `po.status = 'NOT_SENT'` or equivalent draft state |
| 2 | SENT | PO transmitted to vendor, awaiting delivery | `po.status = 'SENT'` |
| 3 | PARTIAL | PO partially received — at least one GRN exists but qty received < qty ordered on one or more lines | `po.status = 'PARTIAL'` |
| 4 | CLOSED | PO cancelled or closed without full receipt — includes: partial-received POs closed early, and completed POs formally closed | `po.status = 'CLOSED'` — terminal state, no further GRN can be added |
| 5 | COMPLETED | All line items fully received — `grn qty received = po qty ordered` for all lines | `po.status = 'COMPLETED'` |
| 6 | REJECTED | PO rejected (by vendor or internally) | `po.status = 'REJECTED'` — terminal state |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Calculation | `COUNT(po.id)` per status WHERE `po.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Scope | Real-time, all-time (not MTD) — current state of all POs |
| Progress bar | Colour-coded: orange = not sent, blue = sent/partial, grey = closed, green = completed, red = rejected |

---

## D3.3 Pending PRs for PO Creation

PRs that have been fully approved and are waiting for the Purchaser to generate a PO.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| PR ID | `pr.pr_number` | Clickable — navigates to PR detail |
| Requester | `user.name` of PR creator | |
| Dept | `department.name` of PR creator | |
| Date Approved ↓ | `pr_workflow_history.action_date` WHERE `action = 'APPROVE'` AND final approval stage | Sorted descending by default |
| Status | PO creation status badge | See badge table below |

### Status Badge Values

| Badge | Colour | Meaning | Trigger |
|-------|--------|---------|---------|
| Pending PO | Green | PR approved, PO not yet created | System — set automatically when PR reaches final approval |
| Hold for Info | Orange | PR approved but PO creation is on hold | Manual — Purchaser sets this flag when more information is needed before creating the PO |
| Overdue Follow-up | Faded / muted | PO not created and delivery is overdue | System — automatically set when `current_date > po_detail.required_date` (the expected received date on the item) with no GRN received |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Filter | `pr.status = 'APPROVED'` AND no PO yet created (`po.pr_id` does not exist or PO not generated) AND `pr.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Sort | Date Approved descending |
| Scope | Real-time — all approved PRs awaiting PO creation |

---

## D3.4 Overdue Deliveries List

POs where the expected delivery date has passed and goods have not yet been fully received.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| PO ID | `po.po_number` | Truncated in list — clickable to PO detail |
| Vendor | `vendor.name` linked to the PO | |
| Dept | `department.name` of the originating PR creator | |
| Due Date ↓ | `po_detail.required_date` (per item) or `po.delivery_date` | The expected/required delivery date set per item at the PR level by the requester — inherited through to the PO |
| Days Overdue | `CURRENT_DATE - po.delivery_date` (or `po_detail.required_date`) | Shown in red |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Due date source | Required delivery date entered **per item by the requester at PR creation** — carried through to the PO line item. **Purchaser may override this date when creating the PO.** |
| Filter | `po.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CLOSED', 'REJECTED')` AND delivery date < today AND `po.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Scope | **All-time regardless of age** — any open PO past its delivery date appears, no date cutoff |
| Sort | Due date ascending (most overdue first — indicated by ↓ on column header) |

---

## D3.5 On-Time Delivery (Gauge)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Display | Circular gauge, percentage |
| Definition | Percentage of POs where `grn.received_date ≤ po.delivery_date` (or `po_detail.required_date`) — delivery was received on or before the due date |
| Calculation | `COUNT(po where received_date ≤ delivery_date) / COUNT(all completed/partially received POs) * 100` |
| Scope | Current calendar month (MTD); historical months selectable via calendar picker |
| Colour | Green when healthy (observed 92%), orange approaching threshold |

---

## D3.6 Order Completeness (Gauge)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Display | Circular gauge, percentage |
| Definition | Percentage of PO line items where qty fully received — `grn_detail.qty_received = po_detail.qty_ordered` |
| Calculation | `COUNT(po_detail lines where fully received) / COUNT(all po_detail lines in scope) * 100` |
| Scope | Current calendar month (MTD); historical months selectable via calendar picker |
| Colour | Green when healthy (observed 95%) |
| Notes | A PO with all lines fully received = COMPLETED status. A PO with some lines fully received and others not = PARTIAL. Order Completeness measures at the **line level**, not the PO level. |

---

## D3.7 Category Spend — Current Month vs YTD

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Chart type | Donut (current month) + value labels showing Cur Mo amount and YTD amount per category |
| Source | PO line items (`po_detail`) joined to `item` → `material_group` |
| Calculation | Two values per segment: (a) `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` for current month; (b) `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` year-to-date (Jan 1 to today) |
| PO scope | POs that have at least one related GRN (goods received) — PARTIAL and COMPLETED POs only. CLOSED/cancelled POs with no GRN are excluded. |
| Segments observed | Food (อาหาร) 45%, Beverage (เครื่องดื่ม) 30%, Guest Supply (ของใช้แขก) 25% |
| Labels | Category name + percentage (donut) + Cur Mo value + YTD value (legend) |

---

## D3.8 Top 5 Vendors by Spend (Bar Chart)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Chart type | Horizontal bar |
| Source | PO line items grouped by `vendor.name` |
| Calculation | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` GROUP BY `vendor.name` WHERE same PO scope as §D3.7 AND current month |
| Bars | Top 5 vendors by MTD spend, sorted descending |
| Value label | Currency value at end of each bar |

---

## D3.9 Delivery Summary Cards (right column)

| Card | Label | Calculation |
|------|-------|-------------|
| Top card | Deliveries: 5 | `COUNT(grn.id)` for today — GRNs received today |
| Bottom card | This Week: 20 | `COUNT(grn.id)` for current calendar week (Mon–Sun or Sun–Sat TBC) |

---

## D3.10 Confirmed Answers

| # | Question | Answer |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | What triggers the "Overdue Follow-up" badge? | System-set — fires when `current_date > po_detail.required_date` with no GRN received |
| 2 | Gauge scope — MTD or all-time? | Current calendar month MTD; historical months selectable via calendar picker |
| 3 | Can Purchaser change the delivery date on the PO? | Yes — Purchaser can override the requester's required date when creating the PO |
| 4 | Does Category Spend include cancelled POs? | No — only POs with at least one related GRN (PARTIAL / COMPLETED); cancelled POs with no GRN excluded |
| 5 | Timezone for delivery count cards? | Local property timezone (e.g. Bangkok GMT+7) |

---

# Dashboard 4 — Goods Receive Note (GRN) Dashboard

![GRN Dashboard](data:image/png;base64,)

**Route:** `/dashboard/grn`
**Title:** Goods Receive Note
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-21
**Source:** Screenshots (Images 5 & 6) — ZB01 ZEBRA, Purchase role

---

## D4.1 Scope & Filters

| Filter | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Tenant / Property | Current session tenant | JWT / session context |
| User scope | Organisation-wide (all departments) | Not personal |
| Timezone | Local property timezone (GMT+7) | Consistent with other dashboards |

---

## D4.2 KPI Cards (Top Row)

### Card 1 — Receiving Now

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Display | Integer count |
| Recommended definition | POs where `po.expected_delivery_date = today` AND `po.status IN ('SENT', 'PARTIAL')` — POs scheduled to arrive today that have not yet been fully received |
| Rationale | "Receiving Now" implies active open expectation for today; excludes fully completed or cancelled POs |
| Icon | → arrow (in progress / awaiting) |

### Card 2 — Received Today

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Display | Integer count |
| Definition | Count of GRN documents with `grn.status = 'COMMITTED'` AND `grn.committed_date = today` (local timezone) |
| Scope | All committed GRNs for today — partial and full receipts both counted |
| Icon | ✓ checkmark (completed) |

### Card 3 — GRN Total (MTD)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Display | Integer count |
| Definition | `COUNT(grn.id)` WHERE `grn.committed_date` within current calendar month AND `grn.status = 'COMMITTED'` |
| Scope | Current month; historical months selectable via calendar picker (consistent with §D3.5) |
| Icon | Calendar |

### Card 4 — GRN Total (YTD)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Display | Integer count |
| Definition | `COUNT(grn.id)` WHERE `grn.committed_date` within current year (Jan 1 to today) AND `grn.status = 'COMMITTED'` |
| Icon | Box / package |

---

## D4.3 Pending Purchase Orders (PO)

POs that are expected for delivery, with tabs to switch time window.

### Tabs

| Tab | Filter |
|-----|--------|
| TODAY | `po.expected_delivery_date = today` |
| THIS WEEK | `po.expected_delivery_date` within current Mon–Sun week |
| NEXT WEEK | `po.expected_delivery_date` within next Mon–Sun week |

### Columns

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Supplier Name | `vendor.name` | |
| Expected Date | `po.expected_delivery_date` (set by Purchaser; may differ from PR required date) | |
| Items Count | `COUNT(po_detail.id)` for this PO | Number of line items |
| Total Amount | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` | PO value |
| Priority | Calculated badge — see below | |

### Priority Badge — Recommended Logic

> **Recommendation:** Priority should be system-calculated based on urgency relative to today's date:

| Badge | Colour | Rule |
|-------|--------|------|
| High | Red | `po.expected_delivery_date ≤ today` — due today or already overdue |
| Medium | Orange/Yellow | `po.expected_delivery_date` within next 1–3 days |
| Low | Grey/Green | `po.expected_delivery_date` more than 3 days away |

> Alternatively, priority could factor in PO value (high-value POs = higher priority) or be manually set by the Purchaser. **Confirm which approach is preferred.**

### Filter

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| PO status | `po.status IN ('SENT', 'PARTIAL')` — only open POs awaiting receipt |
| Sort | Expected date ascending (soonest first) |
| Scope | Real-time |

---

## D4.4 Overdue Purchase Orders

POs past their expected delivery date with no full receipt.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| PO ID | `po.po_number` | |
| Supplier | `vendor.name` | |
| Original Due Date | `po.expected_delivery_date` | The delivery date set on the PO (Purchaser may have changed from PR required date) |
| Days Overdue | `CURRENT_DATE - po.expected_delivery_date` | Shown as integer when small; "OVERDUE" badge when large/unspecified |
| Items Count | `COUNT(po_detail.id)` | |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Filter | `po.status IN ('SENT', 'PARTIAL')` AND `po.expected_delivery_date < today` AND `po.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Scope | All-time regardless of age (consistent with §D3.4) |
| Sort | Days overdue descending (most overdue first) |
| Colour | Days Overdue value shown in red; "OVERDUE" badge for entries where exact days is not displayed |

---

## D4.5 Incomplete GRNs (Partial Receipts)

GRNs where at least one line item has qty received < qty ordered.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Supplier | `vendor.name` via `po.vendor_id` | |
| Qty Ordered | `SUM(po_detail.qty_ordered)` across all lines in the PO | Total PO quantity |
| Qty Received | `SUM(grn_detail.qty_received)` for all GRN lines against this PO | Total received to date |
| Variance | `(qty_ordered - qty_received) / qty_ordered * 100` — percentage of qty still outstanding | See options below |
| Status | `Partially Received` badge | Shown when any line remains unreceived |

### Variance % — Recommended Options

> **Note: The sample data in the UI contains errors** (e.g. GRN01 shows Qty Ordered 30, Qty Received 30 but is marked "Partially Received" with 0.20% variance — this is inconsistent). The variance definition should be confirmed and the data corrected.

| Option | Formula | Use case |
|--------|---------|----------|
| **A — Qty variance (recommended)** | `(qty_ordered - qty_received) / qty_ordered * 100` | Shows what % of ordered qty is still outstanding — most intuitive for receiving staff |
| B — Value variance | `(po_line_amount - grn_amount) / po_line_amount * 100` | Shows financial exposure of unreceived goods |
| C — Line completeness | `COUNT(fully received lines) / COUNT(total lines) * 100` | Shows how many SKUs are complete |

> **Recommendation:** Use **Option A (qty variance)** as the primary metric — it directly answers "how much is still expected?" A GRN should only appear in this table if `qty_received < qty_ordered` across the combined lines.

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Filter | GRNs (committed) linked to POs where total qty received < total qty ordered AND `grn.tenant_id = current_tenant` |
| Scope | Real-time — all open partial receipts |

---

## D4.6 Over-Received GRNs (Excess Receipts)

GRNs where the received value exceeds the PO value.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Supplier | `vendor.name` | |
| PO Amount | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` | Total value of the original PO |
| GRN Amount | `SUM(grn_detail.line_amount)` | Total value of goods actually received |
| Excess Amount | `GRN Amount - PO Amount` | Positive = over-received; negative = under-received relative to PO value |
| Variance % | `(GRN Amount - PO Amount) / PO Amount * 100` | Shown in red when negative |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Filter | GRNs where `GRN Amount > PO Amount` (or variance % ≠ 0 — includes both over and under by value) |
| Notes | Negative Excess Amount (e.g. Elite Beverages $-30.00) indicates GRN value is less than PO value — may indicate price difference rather than quantity excess. Confirm whether this table should show only over-received (positive) or all variances |
| Scope | Real-time |

---

## D4.7 Top 5 Vendors by Purchase YTD

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Chart type | Horizontal bar |
| Source | PO line items (`po_detail`) joined to `vendor` — **includes all POs with at least one related GRN received** |
| Calculation | `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` GROUP BY `vendor.name` WHERE GRN exists for the PO AND `po.tenant_id = current_tenant` AND YTD |
| Scope | Year-to-date (Jan 1 to today) |
| Bars | Top 5 vendors sorted descending by total spend |
| X-axis | USD Millions |

---

## D4.8 Purchasing Spend by Category

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Chart type | Grouped vertical bar — Current Month (dark blue) vs YTD Total (light blue) |
| Source | PO line items (`po_detail`) joined to `item` → `material_group` — **PO-based** (not GRN-based) |
| Calculation | Two bars per category: (a) `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` current month; (b) `SUM(po_detail.total_amount)` YTD |
| PO scope | All PO statuses included (committed at PO creation, not GRN receipt) |
| Categories observed | Food (อาหาร), Beverage (เครื่องดื่ม), Guest Supply (ของใช้แขก) |
| Toggle | CURRENT MONTH / YTD TOTAL selector top-right |
| Y-axis | Currency ($) — scale $0–$60 (units: thousands TBC) |

---

## D4.9 Open Questions

| # | Question | Impact |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | Confirm the definition of "Receiving Now" — is it POs expected today with no full GRN, or something else? | §D4.2 Card 1 |
| 2 | Confirm Priority badge logic — date-based, value-based, or manual? | §D4.3 |
| 3 | Confirm Variance % formula for Incomplete GRNs — which option (A/B/C)? Fix sample data. | §D4.5 |
| 4 | Over-Received GRNs table — should it show only positive excess, or all value variances? | §D4.6 |
| 5 | Purchasing Spend by Category Y-axis unit — is $60 thousands or actual dollars? | §D4.8 |

---

# Dashboard 5 — Inventory Management Dashboard

![Inventory Management Dashboard](data:image/png;base64,)

**Route:** `/dashboard/inventory`
**Title:** Inventory Management
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-21
**Source:** Screenshot — ZB01 ZEBRA, Purchase role

---

## D5.1 Scope & Filters

| Filter | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Tenant / Property | Current session tenant | JWT / session context |
| Scope | Organisation-wide across all locations | Not personal |
| Timezone | Local property timezone (GMT+7) | |

---

## D5.2 Status Pipeline (Top Row)

| Card | Label | Definition | Calculation |
|------|-------|-----------|-------------|
| 1 | Location count — STOCK TAKE NOT COMPLETE | Locations where the current period PST (Physical Stock Take) is not yet in Completed status | `COUNT(location)` WHERE `pst.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED')` AND current period |
| 2 | Location count — STOCK TAKE COMPLETE | Locations where PST is fully completed | `COUNT(location)` WHERE `pst.status = 'COMPLETED'` AND current period |
| 3 | Doc count — UNCOMMITTED DOCS (CURR MO.) | Count of uncommitted stock take documents + uncommitted receiving (GRN) documents in the current month | `COUNT(pst_docs WHERE committed = false) + COUNT(grn WHERE status != 'COMMITTED')` within current month |
| 4 | Item count — EXPIRING ITEMS (CURR MO.) | Items expiring within the next 30 days (default window — selectable) | `COUNT(lot_master.items)` WHERE `expiry_date BETWEEN today AND today + 30 days` |
| 5 | Inventory Value (CURR MO.) | Total current on-hand inventory value = `SUM(item.on_hand_qty × item.cost_price)` across all locations, current month snapshot | Valued at cost price |

---

## D5.3 Slow-Moving / Dead Stock (Task Queue)

Items with no stock movement for a configurable number of days — threshold set per location.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Item Name | `item.name` | |
| SKU | `item.sku` | |
| Location | `inventory_location.name` | |
| Days No Movement | `CURRENT_DATE - MAX(inventory_transaction.transaction_date)` for this item at this location | No issue, receipt, or adjustment in this many days |
| Est. Value | `item.on_hand_qty × item.cost_price` | Current on-hand value at cost |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Threshold | Configurable per location (not a global fixed number) — set in location settings |
| Location selector | Tabs: Main Store / Kitchen / Bar — filters the table to the selected location |
| Filter | Items where days since last movement > location threshold AND `on_hand_qty > 0` |
| Sort | Days No Movement descending |
| Scope | Real-time |

---

## D5.4 Inventory Replenishment (Below Par)

Items where current on-hand quantity is below the configured Par Level.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Item Name | `item.name` | |
| SKU | `item.sku` | |
| Location | `inventory_location.name` | |
| On Hand | `inventory.on_hand_qty` at this location | Current stock level |
| Par Level | `item_location.par_level` | Minimum stock threshold — replenishment triggered when On Hand falls below this |
| Max Level | `item_location.max_level` | Target replenishment level |
| Order Qty | `max_level - on_hand_qty` (suggested order quantity) | TBC — may be calculated or manual |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Filter | `inventory.on_hand_qty < item_location.par_level` AND location = selected tab |
| Location selector | Tabs: Main Store / Kitchen / Bar |
| CREATE PR button | Creates a Purchase Request for the **selected item(s)** only — not all rows in the table |
| Sort | Most below par first (largest gap between on_hand and par_level) |

---

## D5.5 Physical Stock Take Status (PST Process)

Summary of PST document status per location for the current stock take cycle.

| Column | Source | Detail |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Location | `inventory_location.name` | |
| Dept | `department.name` linked to the location | |
| Last Count Date | `pst_document.last_count_date` | Date the most recent count was performed |
| PST Status | `pst_document.status` | See status table below |
| SVF Name | `svf_document.name` or reference | Stock Verification Form linked to this location's count |

### PST Status Values

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| Completed | Count finalised and committed |
| Awaiting Approval | Count submitted, pending approver sign-off |
| In Progress | Count started but not yet submitted |

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Note | "Connects back to previous responses" — **recommended:** clicking a row navigates to the full PST document detail for that location |
| Scope | Current stock take cycle / period |
| Sort | Location alphabetical or by status priority (In Progress first) — TBC |

---

## D5.6 Inventory Value by Material Group (Donut Chart)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Chart type | Donut + legend with value ranges |
| Definition | Current on-hand inventory value grouped by material group = `SUM(on_hand_qty × cost_price)` GROUP BY `material_group` |
| Segments | Food (45%), Beverage (30%), Chemical Supplies (25%) — and others |
| Value shown | Range values in legend (e.g. Food $887,750 – 45%) |
| Scope | Real-time snapshot of current on-hand value — not MTD |
| Accompanying bar | Small comparison bar visible — likely Cur Mo vs prior month or budget comparison (TBC) |

---

## D5.7 Expired Items Alert (LOT/EXP Master)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Source | `lot_master` — items tracked by lot/batch with expiry dates |
| Default window | Next **30 days** from today (items expiring within 30 days) |
| Window selector | Selectable — user can change the look-ahead window |
| Columns | Item Name, Expiry Date |
| Filter | `lot_master.expiry_date BETWEEN today AND today + selected_window` AND `lot_master.on_hand_qty > 0` |
| Sort | Expiry date ascending (soonest expiry first) |
| Scope | All locations, current tenant |
| Indicator | Red ⛔ dot = already expired or expiring very soon |

---

## D5.8 Total Consumption by Location (Cur Mo vs YTD)

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Chart type | Horizontal bar |
| Source | Store Requisition (SR) committed (issued) documents + Sales transactions |
| Calculation | `SUM(sr_detail.qty × item.cost_price)` WHERE `sr.status = 'COMMITTED'` GROUP BY `location.name` |
| Two values | Current month (dark bar) + YTD (light bar) |
| Scope | Current calendar month MTD + year-to-date |
| Locations shown | Main Store, Kitchen, Bar (all locations) |

---

## D5.9 Total Consumption by Category

| Attribute | Detail |
|-----------|--------|
| Chart type | Horizontal bar |
| Source | SR Committed (Issues) + Sales — same source as §D5.8 |
| Calculation | `SUM(sr_detail.qty × item.cost_price)` GROUP BY `material_group.name` WHERE `sr.status = 'COMMITTED'` AND current month |
| Categories | Food, Beverage, Guest Supply, Chemical |
| SR# Awaiting Receipt | Shows a Store Requisition awaiting GRN receipt — links to SR detail (e.g. SR900156 with "Check Details" action) |

---

## D5.10 Confirmed Answers

| # | Question | Answer |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | What are uncommitted docs? | Uncommitted stock take documents + uncommitted receiving (GRN) docs |
| 2 | Days No Movement threshold | Configurable per location — set in location settings |
| 3 | CREATE PR button scope | Creates PR for selected item(s) only |
| 4 | PST row click behaviour | Recommended: navigate to PST document detail for that location |
| 5 | Inventory Value basis | Current on-hand value (qty × cost price) — not MTD spend |
| 6 | Expired Items window | Future-looking; default 30 days; window is selectable |
| 7 | Consumption source | SR Committed (Issues) + Sales |

---

# Dashboard 6 — Store Requisition Dashboard

![Store Requisition Dashboard](data:image/png;base64,)

**Route:** `/dashboard/sr`
**Access:** All roles (Requestor, HOD, FC, GM, Owner) — data scope varies by role

## D6.1 Scope & Filters

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Default time window | MTD (Month to Date) for all consumption and pipeline counts |
| Role scoping | Requestor: own SRs only; HOD: department SRs; FC / GM / Owner: all SRs |
| Property/outlet | Inherited from logged-in user's property context |

## D6.2 SR Summary — Status Pipeline (Top Row)

Four status cards showing cumulative MTD SR counts at each workflow stage.

| Card | Label | Subtitle | Colour | Status Meaning |
|------|-------|----------|--------|----------------|
| 1 | REQUESTED | Newly Submitted | Orange | SR submitted, not yet actioned |
| 2 | IN PROCESS | Fulfilling/Processing | Blue | SR under review or being fulfilled |
| 3 | APPROVED | Ready for Issue/Receiving | Green | SR approved, awaiting physical issue |
| 4 | ISSUED | Material Handed Over | Dark Green | SR fulfilled — final stage |

**Data derivation:**

| Field | Source |
|-------|--------|
| Count | `COUNT(sr.id)` WHERE `sr.status = <stage>` AND `sr.created_at` within current month (MTD) |
| Scope | Filtered by role — requestor: `sr.created_by = user.id`; HOD: `sr.department_id = user.department_id`; FC/GM/Owner: no dept filter |
| Click behaviour | Recommended: navigate to SR list pre-filtered to that status |

## D6.3 Sent Back SRs

SRs belonging to the logged-in user that were returned by a reviewer for correction or additional information.

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| SR# | Store Requisition number — links to SR detail |
| Requester | Name of the SR creator |
| Date Sent | Date the SR was sent back |
| Sender | Name of the reviewer who sent it back |
| Reason | Reason text entered by the sender (e.g. Invalid Account Code, Wrong Dept) |

**Data derivation:**

| Field | Source |
|-------|--------|
| Scope | `sr.created_by = user.id` AND `sr.status = 'SENT_BACK'` |
| Sort | Most recent `sent_back_at` date first |
| Action | Click SR# → SR detail; user can edit and resubmit |

## D6.4 Reject List (SRs & Items)

Individual SRs or line items that have been rejected. Scope: current user's own rejected records only.

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| SR# | Store Requisition number (may be blank if item-level rejection) |
| Material Name | Name of the rejected item (truncated if long) |
| Requester | SR creator name |
| Rejected By | Reviewer who rejected |
| Reason | Rejection reason (e.g. Duplicate Request, Over Par, Over Consumption Limit) |

**Data derivation:**

| Field | Source |
|-------|--------|
| Scope | `sr.created_by = user.id` AND (`sr.status = 'REJECTED'` OR `sr_detail.status = 'REJECTED'`) |
| Granularity | Row per rejected item within an SR — multiple rows possible per SR number |

## D6.5 SRs Awaiting Approval

SRs pending approval at any stage in the workflow, filtered to what the logged-in user is responsible for approving.

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| PR No | Purchase Request number associated with the SR |
| Description | SR or PR description |
| Amount | Total SR/PR value |
| Stage | Current approval stage (e.g. HOD Approved, Procurement Review, Final Approval) |

**Time filter tabs:** Today / Week / Month — controls the date window for the listed records.

**Data derivation:**

| Field | Source |
|-------|--------|
| Requestor scope | `sr.created_by = user.id` AND `sr.status IN ('PENDING_HOD', 'PENDING_FC', 'PENDING_GM')` |
| HOD scope | `sr.department_id = user.department_id` AND `sr.status = 'PENDING_HOD'` |
| FC / GM / Owner scope | All departments — `sr.status = 'PENDING_FC'` or `'PENDING_GM'` respectively |
| Bulk action | **Bulk Submit** button (top-right) — submits all selected pending SRs in one action |

## D6.6 My Consumption (Personal)

Donut chart showing the logged-in user's personal SR consumption spend for the current month (MTD), broken down by material category.

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Chart type | Donut / pie |
| Centre label | Total MTD personal consumption value (e.g. `$18,000`) |
| Segments | Material categories (Food, Beverage, Guest Supply, etc.) |
| Source | `SUM(sr_detail.qty × item.cost_price)` WHERE `sr.created_by = user.id` AND `sr.status = 'COMMITTED'` AND current month MTD |
| Legend | Category name + value |

## D6.7 Dept Consumption (Department)

Horizontal bar chart showing the user's department's SR consumption spend MTD by material category. Displayed alongside My Consumption for personal-vs-dept comparison.

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Chart type | Horizontal bar |
| Scope | `sr.department_id = user.department_id` — all users in dept |
| Source | `SUM(sr_detail.qty × item.cost_price)` WHERE `sr.status = 'COMMITTED'` AND current month MTD |
| Categories | Food, Beverage, Guest Supply (same categories as My Consumption) |
| Header | Shows dept name (e.g. "F&B Dept") |

## D6.8 SR Awaiting Received

List of Purchase Orders (raised from approved SRs) that are pending delivery/GRN. These represent SRs that have been approved and converted to POs, but the physical goods have not yet been received.

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| PR No | Purchase Request number |
| Description | Item or SR description |
| Amount | PO value |

**Data derivation:**

| Field | Source |
|-------|--------|
| Scope | POs linked to the current user's SRs where `po.status = 'PENDING_DELIVERY'` or equivalent GRN-not-yet-created state |
| Scope by role | Same role-based scoping as §D6.2 |
| Click | Recommended: navigate to PO or GRN detail |

## D6.9 My Templates

List of shared SR templates available to the logged-in user. Templates allow quick creation of recurring SRs (e.g. weekly kitchen requisition).

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Source | Shared template library — not user-private |
| Display | Template name with document icon |
| Action | Click template → pre-populate new SR form with template items |
| Examples | Weekly Kitchen Requisition, Pool Requisition Template, Housekeeping Amenities, Weekly Kitchen Template |

## D6.10 Confirmed Answers

| # | Question | Answer |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | Pipeline count basis | MTD cumulative counts per status; Issued = final stage |
| 2 | Sent Back SRs scope | Current user's own SRs that were returned — not dept-wide |
| 3 | Reject List scope | Current user's own rejected SRs/items only |
| 4 | SRS Awaiting Approval scope | Role-based: Requestor = own; HOD = dept; FC/GM/Owner = all depts |
| 5 | My Consumption period | MTD |
| 6 | Dept Consumption period | MTD (same as My Consumption) |
| 7 | SR Awaiting Received meaning | PO raised from the SR is pending delivery (goods not yet received/GRN not created) |
| 8 | My Templates visibility | Shared templates — visible to multiple users, not private |
